inputs.label: Contract Value
inputs.businessContext: Total contract amount awarded to subcontractor. Source: contract documents.

inputs.label: Actual Cost Incurred
inputs.businessContext: Total cost incurred by subcontractor including labor, materials, equipment, overhead. Source: cost reports.

inputs.label: Rework Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of rework due to defects or non-compliance. Source: quality records.

inputs.label: Delay Penalties
inputs.businessContext: Penalties incurred for schedule delays. Source: contract terms.

inputs.label: Change Order Impact
inputs.businessContext: Net cost impact of change orders (positive = additional cost, negative = savings). Source: change order logs.

inputs.label: Warranty Claims
inputs.businessContext: Costs from warranty claims post-completion. Source: warranty records.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in accuracy of input data. Low = high uncertainty, high = audited data. Source: data quality assessment.

thresholds.marginLeakPercent > 10: Critical: Margin leak exceeds 10% of contract value.
thresholds.reworkCost > 0.05 * contractValue: Warning: Rework cost exceeds 5% of contract value.
thresholds.delayPenalties > 0.02 * contractValue: Warning: Delay penalties exceed 2% of contract value.

suggestedActions: Implement quality control to reduce rework.
Improve schedule management to avoid delays.
